description:
This quiz tests intermediate to advanced PostgreSQL knowledge, covering both familiar and lesser-known features such as built-in aggregates, type casting, and constraints. The teaching tone is enthusiastic and encouraging, aiming to teach new tricks and gotchas. The target audience is developers and database administrators looking to deepen their PostgreSQL mastery.
Topics: PostgreSQL, aggregates, type casting, constraints, gotchas
Audience: Developers and database administrators with PostgreSQL experience
